what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that links a board item (board://item-e62c2915) to the dragnet-development channel as a board_items attachment, with a creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
References an external board item via a board:// URI
standouts: Target uses the board://item-e62c2915 URI scheme
conventions: Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added
Uses a board:// URI for cross-resource referencing
concerns: No body or contextual content beyond metadata
Referenced board item cannot be resolved from this file alone
No author or provenance for who added the attachment
notes: A metadata-only attachment stub that ties a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: Who added this attachment and why?
What does attachment_type board_items imply semantically?
Does the referenced board item still exist?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment metadata record matches the content: it points a channel to a board item; the actual file is only a pointer with no additional payload.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog or link a board item into a channel's memory as an attachment, so the board context can be retrieved alongside channel activity.
contribution: Provides a durable, timestamped pointer from a channel to a specific board item, preserving the association independently of the board system.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file that associates board item board://item-e62c2915 with the dragnet-development channel as a board_items attachment.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel at a specific time.
